title: MANCE: Manifold Aware Concept Erasure
innovation_summary: MANCE: Manifold Aware Concept Erasure: We propose the Manifold Constraint Hypothesis (MCH): if natural representations concentrate on a structured, lower-dimensional manifold, then interventions should be constrained to that manifold and better.
